title: Lava XP Bar
description: Gives the XP bar the lava texture
body:
### Description Gives a lava texture and animation to the XP Bar, and turns the empty part red. *Does not change the texture of orbs or the level number. This may be added in a future update. For now, you can use along with another red XP pack to achieve this effect.* ### Versions Currently supports Minecraft **Java Edition 1.20.2 - 26.1**. ### Compatibility Incompatible with any resource pack that modifies or animates the XP bar, such as rainbow XP bar packs. **For the best experience, use along with any pack that turns the XP orbs red or orange. If the other pack contains XP bar textures along with orbs, put this pack above it in the resource pack list.** ### Patreon Join my new Patreon to support my projects!

## Want more XP Bar packs? ![Animated XP Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a086bb57eda1d0a5d98e5ac3d54249187aaf7d34.gif) ![Lava XP Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7274d284c329dbe9542f650566558a56273cb15f.gif) ![Stone Brick XP Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1166a7d73761f469c0d532521679079c9343601f.png) ![Sculk XP Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bb4c39944af28ed79efa18881f60bcf3b9000f2.gif)
